title: elatine paludosa var. hexandra
intro: Elatine paludosa var. hexandra, also known as Marsh elliptic or Marsh Elatine, is a rare and perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Elatinaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elatine paludosa var. hexandra include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and ointments, although its availability and usage may vary due to its rarity.
